summary: Generated the full Codex DL harness metadata package for the provided normalized plan, including deterministic CPU-only workflow definitions, orchestration scripts, execution prompts, progress tracking, synchronization policy, and mechanism docs. All mandatory `.codex-research/` core files are included and ordered consistently.

required_files.reason: Canonical spec grounding objectives, constraints, and success gates.
Machine-readable feature list aligned to the normalized plan.
Machine-readable execution plan consumed by Codex runners.
Path manifest consumed for harness validation and auditing.
Live session tracker and operator-facing checkpoint log.
Tracks ambiguity resolutions and justifications for critical choices.
Append-only execution history for checkpoints and status transitions.
Bootstraps local environment, directories, and remote target; enforces CPU/pip baseline.
Deterministic 2-epoch smoke validation and artifact assertions.
Defines bootstrap behavior for each run.
Guides worker actions and required update/sync discipline.
Codex-specific operational protocol and state machine.
Executes one planned task ID and performs sync + registry logging.
Runs ordered tasks with registry bookkeeping and final progress marker.
Chinese operator guide for reproducible execution and verification steps.
Explains governance, artifact contracts, and failure semantics for this Codex DL mechanism.

feature_list.description: Establish a deterministic, CPU-only environment using conda `vibe_test` with pip-managed dependencies and fixed Python/PyTorch seeds across data, dataloading, and training.
steps: Pin runtime to Python 3.10+ and avoid GPU-specific launchers
Set and persist `PYTHONHASHSEED`, `random.seed`, NumPy, and PyTorch deterministic flags
Use fixed default seeds in generation, train, and eval entrypoints
Document seed behavior in spec and run scripts

feature_list.description: Create and persist pre-generated synthetic train/validation data from a known continuous function with controlled noise for learnable regression.
steps: Implement `scripts/generate_data.py` to synthesize features and labels
Persist tensors to `artifacts/data/train.pt` and `artifacts/data/val.pt`
Write metadata (seed, split sizes, coefficients, noise level) to JSON
Validate dataset shape and non-degeneracy at generation time

feature_list.description: Implement a tiny MLP bounded by constraints (<=2 hidden layers, <=32 hidden units) suitable for small synthetic regression.
steps: Create `src/model.py` with input -> [dense, activation] -> output architecture
Enforce width <=32 and max 2 hidden layers through defaults/assertions
Initialize deterministically with fixed seed and torch manual seed
Expose a minimal API callable from train/eval scripts

feature_list.description: Build deterministic 10-epoch CPU training with metric tracking, checkpointing, and epoch-by-epoch progress output.
steps: Implement `src/train.py` with DataLoader, optimizer, MSE loss, and fixed defaults
Log train/val loss per epoch to console and `artifacts/logs/train_progress.jsonl`
Save checkpoints (`last.pt`, `best.pt`) and optionally best-metric metadata
Guard against NaN/Inf losses and fail fast with explicit errors

feature_list.description: Implement validation metric computation and deterministic reporting for smoke and full runs.
steps: Implement `src/eval.py` for deterministic validation pass
Write epoch-level summary to `artifacts/logs/eval_progress.jsonl`
Report final and best validation MSE in machine-readable form
Use fixed dataloader order with no shuffling in validation

feature_list.description: Add deterministic smoke test plus run-time checks for reproducibility and file integrity.
steps: Add `checks/smoke_test.sh` requiring at least 2 epochs
Verify artifacts (`train`, `val`, logs, checkpoints, report) exist
Check non-empty progress logs and finite numeric losses
Ensure a clean second run with same seed produces stable metrics

feature_list.description: Integrate explicit progress checkpoints and repository synchronization with each progress update.
steps: Maintain `session_progress.md` with task status and latest metrics
Append status objects to `.codex-research/run_registry.jsonl`
Run git sync against `https://github.com/CHDTevior/vibe_test.git` on checkpointed updates
Record sync attempts (success/failure) with timestamps

feature_list.description: Provide runnable entry scripts for single-task and full-plan execution with deterministic ordering.
steps: Implement `run_one_task.sh` mapped to task IDs
Implement `run_plan.sh` executing ordered task list
Use fixed 10-epoch defaults in full run path
Emit structured failure messages without silent fallbacks

rules: CPU-only execution only (no Slurm, no GPU assumptions)
Use only pre-generated synthetic data from local scripts; no online dataset fetching
Keep model tiny: <=2 hidden layers, hidden size <=32
Run 10 epochs as primary full-reproducibility target
Use deterministic seeding and deterministic transforms everywhere
Update progress + sync at each checkpoint and never silently skip failures
Prefer explicit error messages over default exceptions

tasks.title: Bootstrap environment and repository controls
tasks.description: Create and validate workspace skeleton, install minimal dependencies through pip, and register canonical remote.
steps: Run `.codex-research/init.sh`
Create `src/`, `configs/`, `scripts/`, `artifacts/`, and required `.codex-research` subfolders
Write `requirements.txt` and initialize `artifacts/.init_marker`

tasks.title: Generate deterministic synthetic regression dataset
tasks.description: Create train/val data from a known function and persist to disk.
steps: Execute `scripts/generate_data.py` with fixed seed 123
Save `artifacts/data/train.pt` and `artifacts/data/val.pt`
Store generation metadata in `artifacts/data/dataset_meta.json`
Verify no NaN/Inf values in tensors

tasks.title: Implement deterministic tiny MLP model
tasks.description: Add constrained regression model in `src/model.py` and sanity-compile.
steps: Implement model with up to two hidden layers and width <=32
Add forward test for shape and dtype consistency
Guard default architecture in code comments and checks
Validate compile/syntax via `python -m py_compile src/model.py`

tasks.title: Implement deterministic train loop
tasks.description: Implement fixed 10-epoch training flow with per-epoch metrics and checkpointing.
steps: Add `src/train.py` with fixed dataloader and MSE loss
Set seed in all random paths and deterministic backend flags
Log to `artifacts/logs/train_progress.jsonl` each epoch
Emit `artifacts/checkpoints/last.pt` and `artifacts/checkpoints/best.pt`

tasks.title: Implement validation/evaluation
tasks.description: Create deterministic validation pass and metric reporting.
steps: Add `src/eval.py` to evaluate saved checkpoints
Compute and log val MSE each run
Write report lines to `artifacts/logs/eval_progress.jsonl`
Fail on missing checkpoint or corrupted artifact

tasks.title: Add smoke test
tasks.description: Create and run minimum verification pipeline for correctness and stability.
steps: Implement `checks/smoke_test.sh` with 2+ epoch test path
Assert presence of required artifacts/log files
Check loss monotonic trend in at least first N-1 epochs
Verify deterministic repeatability with fixed seed on rerun

tasks.title: Integrate progress updates and sync
tasks.description: Tie progress checkpoints to explicit repository synchronization commands.
steps: Define checkpoint states in `session_progress.md`
Add progress append to `.codex-research/run_registry.jsonl`
On each checkpoint, attempt git add/commit/push to configured URL
Capture sync failures in registry and keep workflow non-blocking where needed

tasks.title: Produce full run artifacts and final report
tasks.description: Execute full 10-epoch deterministic run and persist final result summary.
steps: Execute `.codex-research/run_plan.sh`
Collect final validation metric and best epoch summary
Write run summary to `artifacts/final_report.json`
Append completion status to session progress and registry
